top_signals.title: U.S. sanctions Nobitex crypto exchange used by Iranian ransomware actors
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Treasury's Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) has announced sanctions against Nobitex, Iran's largest cryptocurrency exchange, for facilitating payments related to terrorist activities. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Republican-led House deals blow to Trump over Iran war
top_signals.summary: Lawmakers vote to block president from carrying out more strikes in Middle East without congressional approval
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Peso Slump Prompts Philippines to Warn Against Forex Speculation
top_signals.summary: The Philippine central bank has cautioned banks against using foreign-exchange derivatives transactions as a tool to profit from currency volatility that has pushed the peso to a record low.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Lower House set to pass ¥3.11 trillion extra budget to ease Mideast war impacts
top_signals.summary: The budget will create a new reserve fund to respond to developments in the conflict while aiding impacted energy users and replenishing the existing reserve fund.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Israel’s tax authority ‘disappointed’ in voluntary crypto disclosures: Report
top_signals.summary: After expecting billions of dollars worth of crypto holdings to be reported during a voluntary disclosure period, the country's tax office only saw 58 filers took advantage of the procedure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India Money Market-Volumes Jump to Record as Bank Lending Booms
top_signals.summary: India’s money-market turnover jumped to a record as state-owned lenders stepped up borrowing to fund booming credit demand.

top_signals.title: Record Singapore-US Rate Gap May Widen Further on Flows, Fed - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Record Singapore-US Rate Gap May Widen Further on Flows, Fed  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Sandmeyer Steel Announces Leadership Transition
top_signals.summary: Sandmeyer Steel Company, a producer of stainless steel, nickel alloy, and titanium plate products, has appointed R. Paul Sandmeyer, III as President and Chief Operating Officer.This appointment marks the transition to fourth- generation family…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
